acquisition method: coupled to the Orbitrap Exploris 240 system, in DDA mode.
alkylation reagent: in-gel alkylation using iodoacetamide (50 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
alkylation concentration: using iodoacetamide (50 mM) in ammonium bicarbonate (25 mM).
cleavage agent: in-gel tryptic digestion with 1.5 to 2 μg trypsin.
fragmentation method: MS1 scans ranged over 350 to 2000 m/z, with AGC target 3.0e6, maximum ion transfer time 50 ms, resolution 70,000, and filter for minimum charge state two.
instrument: coupled to the Orbitrap Exploris 240 system.
labeling: the samples were analyzed using the Thermo Scientific Easy-nLC 1200 system coupled to the Q Exactive Plus Orbitrap system.
